news.headline: MDB Capital partners with TCA Venture Group to offer insights & opportunities to angel investors.
Mellon Foundation launches $25M Frontera Culture Fund to aid artists in U.S.-Mexico Borderlands.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, the Mellon Foundation, known as the largest funder of arts, culture, and humanities in the U.S., unveiled the Frontera Culture Fund. This initiative involves a substantial $25 million investment aimed at backing the artistic and culturally significant endeavors of creators and cultural influencers residing in the country.

news.headline: PRophet, a Stagwell Company, introduces new AI products for brand safety, performance. Released in Oct 2024.
news.summary: Cutting-edge AI technology is being utilized to safeguard brands and forecast an influencer's commercial influence. PRophet, a renowned suite of AI-driven Comms Tech tools, disclosed the launch at the Public Relations Society of America event in New York and Anaheim on October 16, 2024. The solution aims to provide vital support to brands, enhancing their ability to navigate the influencer landscape effectively.

news.headline: Truv partners with Byte Software for loan origination process improvement. Integration to benefit mortgage industry.
news.summary: In New York on October 16, 2024, Truv, a prominent company specializing in income and employment verification solutions, has revealed a significant collaboration with Byte Software, a top-of-the-line loan origination system (LOS) provider. This integration marks a pivotal moment for the mortgage industry by combining two industry leaders to enhance...

news.headline: HR exec pay declined slightly in 2024, Equilar report says. Median pay at $2.3M for top HR leaders at Equilar 500 companies.
news.summary: In 2024, top HR executives experienced a slight dip in compensation as per Equilar’s HR Executive Pay Trends report, with input from the HR Policy Association. At Equilar 500 firms, which include the largest U.S. public companies by revenue, these executives earned a median of $2.3 million, showing a decrease of under 1% compared to the prior year. This minor decline in HR executive pay is attributed to multiple market influences.

news.headline: Children’s Hospital LA starts Halloween Greeting Card Drive. Supporters can choose from 3 designs at CHLA.org/Halloween.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Children’s Hospital Los Angeles (CHLA) is gearing up for Halloween, one of its most cherished holidays. Supporters globally are invited to participate in the hospital’s Halloween greeting card drive. By visiting CHLA.org/Halloween before October 31, individuals can select from three designs to color.

news.headline: Acumatica introduces cloud ERP solution for professional services firms to improve efficiency and growth.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, Acumatica, a prominent cloud ERP provider, unveiled its latest offering, the Professional Services Edition. Specifically designed for small and midsized professional services businesses, this new solution aims to enhance productivity and foster rapid expansion. The launch of this industry-specific product signifies a significant milestone for Acumatica, providing tailored tools and functionalities to promote collaboration and improve operational effectiveness for firms in sectors such as architecture, engineering, IT, and more.

news.headline: Mintegral climbs to top spot in AppsFlyer Performance Index 17, reinforcing its leadership with highest ranking.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global economy is projected to grow by 4% in 2022, following a 3.2% growth in 2021. The United States GDP is expected to increase by 5.7% this year, compared to 4.2% last year. China's economy is forecasted to grow by 5.4% in 2022, up from 8.1% in 2021. The Eurozone is also predicted to see growth of 3.4% in 2022, following a 5.3% growth in 2021. These optimistic projections are attributed to the ongoing vaccination efforts and stimulus packages implemented by various governments to combat the effects of the pandemic on the global economy.

news.headline: Company X buys back 1M of its own shares to boost value for investors.
Wendel acquires about half of Globeducate, a top global K-12 education group. #acquisition #education
Global small personal loans market expected to grow to $158.7 billion by 2032, at a CAGR of 20.1%. Market valued at $31.3 billion in 2023.
news.summary: The article discusses a report by Allied Market Research on the small personal loans market. In 2023, the market was valued at $31.3 billion and is projected to reach $158.7 billion by 2032, with a compound annual growth rate of 20.1% from 2024 to 2032. The report covers different types of small personal loans, age demographics, and distribution channels. Factors like higher interest rates and data security concerns are highlighted as potential restraints, while demographic shifts offer opportunities for market development. The report spans from 2024 to 2032, with a base year of 2023 and a total of 350 pages.

news.headline: The City of New Rochelle unveils Downtown Retail Strategy to enhance offerings with new shopping, dining, & entertainment. Major milestones include the creation of the Vanguard District and initiatives to transform downtown.
news.summary: The City of New Rochelle in New York revealed its Downtown Retail Strategy, a key development in the city's growth as a vibrant urban hub for residents and tourists. Approved by the City Council, the plan introduces the Vanguard District as part of initiatives to enhance the downtown area, making it a more attractive location for shopping, dining, and entertainment. This transformative strategy includes public realm enhancements and accessibility improvements to revitalize the city's downtown area.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs honors Kevin Czinger, Founder and CEO of Divergent Technologies, as most exceptional entrepreneur of 2024.
news.summary: Kevin Czinger, the Founder, Lead Inventor, and CEO of Divergent Technologies, has been honored as one of the most outstanding entrepreneurs at the 2024 Builders and Innovators Summit in Los Angeles. The prestigious recognition by Goldman Sachs highlights his innovative contributions to the industry. The event, which took place on October 16, 2024, showcased Czinger's remarkable leadership and vision. This recognition underscores his significant impact, recognizing his exceptional achievements as a key figure in the field.

news.headline: Gen.G Foundation offers U.S. students study abroad program in Korea HQ, with $1 million pledged for scholarships over ten years.
news.summary: Gen.G has recently revealed that scholarship applications are currently being accepted as part of their $1 million commitment to aiding college students over the span of ten years. The global esports and gaming organization based in Los Angeles disclosed this update today, on October 16, 2024. This initiative stems from Gen.G's ongoing efforts to support students in need through the Gen.G Foundation.

news.headline: ObvioHealth appoints Richard Watkins as CRO to drive revenue growth amid transition to enterprise solutions.
news.summary: ObvioHealth, a prominent global provider of digital clinical trial solutions, has recently named Richard Watkins as its new Chief Revenue Officer (CRO) to lead revenue growth as the company transitions to enterprise solutions. The appointment was announced on October 16, 2024 in New York City. Watkins, an experienced sales leader, will be focused on driving revenue growth for the company. This development comes as ObvioHealth aims to expand its services and offerings in the enterprise sector.

news.headline: Entrepreneurs Griffin Haddrill and Gabby Gamad launch LV8, a digital start-up, aiming to empower brands globally.
news.summary: Las Vegas witnessed the launch of LV8, marking a significant development in the digital marketing sector on Oct. 16, 2024. The venture is the brainchild of Griffin Haddrill, the ex-founder of VRTCL influencer marketing agency, and his partner Gabby Gamad. This new full-service digital marketing platform is set to revolutionize the industry by offering unprecedented opportunities and services to brands and artists globally.

news.headline: Neutrinos launched a new automation platform for insurers with 60+ pre-built assets to accelerate industry reinvention.
news.summary: Singapore-based Neutrinos revealed a significant strategic shift on Oct. 16, 2024, by introducing a cutting-edge automation platform designed to revolutionize the insurance industry. This new platform comes equipped with over 60 pre-built assets to facilitate rapid business process automation for insurance enterprises. Neutrinos, known for its innovative approach, aims to accelerate the industry's digital transformation with this latest launch.

news.headline: M&T Bank (NYSE: MTB) expected to report EPS of $3.64 on 2024-10-17, investors optimistic for positive news and guidance.
news.summary: M&T Bank (NYSE:MTB) is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on Thursday, October 17, 2024. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $3.64 for the bank. Investors are keenly anticipating the announcement, hoping for results that exceed expectations and optimistic guidance for the upcoming quarter.

news.headline: Regent Santa Monica Beach now open in the United States as part of IHG Hotels & Resorts, marking the return of the legendary brand. #LuxuryTravel
news.summary: In Los Angeles on October 16, 2024, the iconic Regent label makes its comeback in the United States with the debut of Regent Santa Monica Beach, a luxurious property under IHG Hotels & Resorts' upscale collection. This exquisite resort, situated along the beach, signifies the revitalized Regent brand's return to the US market.

news.headline: WD-40 (NASDAQ:WDFC) to report EPS of $1.34 on 10/17. Investors await results for potential surpassing estimates.
news.summary: WD-40 (WDFC) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on Thursday, October 17, 2024. Analysts expect the company to report an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.34. Investors are eagerly awaiting this announcement, hoping for results that surpass expectations and positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. This update is significant for new investors, and more details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: San Mateo County launches ADU Resource Center at www.smcadu.org to aid homeowners and jurisdictions in building ADUs.
news.summary: Today, in San Mateo, California, the ADU Resource Center of San Mateo County was officially launched on October 16, 2024. This online platform, www.smcadu.org, aims to assist homeowners and local jurisdictions in constructing additional Dwelling Units (ADUs), with the goal of expediting housing development in the county. This center offers various tools and resources to support this initiative.

news.headline: MasterControl introduces Document Translator AI tool to enhance global document translation, ensuring compliance.
news.summary: MasterControl has introduced its latest AI tool, Document Translator, aimed at maintaining uniform information and boosting compliance on a global scale. The launch took place in Salt Lake City on October 16, 2024. MasterControl, recognized for its manufacturing and quality management software solutions for regulated industries, continues to innovate with this new tool. Designed to enhance accuracy and standardize language across international sites, Document Translator offers significant benefits for ensuring regulatory compliance.

news.headline: Cymbiotika secures $30M in debt financing for growth and expansion, led by RevTek.
news.summary: In San Diego on October 16, 2024, Cymbiotika, a prominent wellness and supplement company focused on transforming health with advanced, scientifically supported products, disclosed the accomplishment of a $30 million debt financing round. The funding was spearheaded by RevTek.

news.headline: Law firm Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check advises Bumble Inc. investors with losses, as securities class action lawsuit filed. Contact firm for details.
news.summary: In Radnor, Pennsylvania on October 16, 2024, Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP, a law firm, has notified investors about a securities class action lawsuit brought against Bumble Inc. ("Bumble") listed on NASDAQ as BMBL. This legal action is on behalf of investors who bought or acquired shares in Bumble.

news.headline: Itaipu's General Director spoke at G20 ministerial meeting in Foz do Iguaçu, Brazil on energy transitions.
news.summary: In Foz do Iguaçu, Brazil, on October 16, 2024, the General Director of Itaipu in Brazil, Enio Verri, delivered a speech at the plenary meeting of the G20 ministers. The discussion took place on the final day of meetings by the Working Group on Energy Transitions at the Bourbon Hotel.

news.headline: Knocking Inc. partners with Brooke Burke for 'Shop ET,' offering online shopping platform. Los Angeles, October 16, 2024.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Knocking, Inc. revealed that Brooke Burke, a well-known TV personality and health, lifestyle, and wellness expert, has joined the company as the host of 'Shop ET,' their latest online shopping platform. This collaboration marks an exciting venture for the company as they aim to provide their services to a global audience.

news.headline: PepsiCo Foundation awards $7,500 grants to 100 local nonprofits in North America, as part of its Community Impact Awards.
news.summary: In Purchase, New York on October 16, 2024, the PepsiCo Foundation revealed the winners of its 2024 Community Impact Awards. This esteemed initiative awards $7,500 grants to 100 nonprofit organizations throughout North America. Every recipient on the list was nominated by PepsiCo, highlighting the company's commitment to supporting community-driven causes.

news.headline: Eater partners with Capital One Dining and SevenRooms to launch app for discovering and booking culinary experiences worldwide.
news.summary: Introducing the Eater app, providing access to unique culinary experiences and exclusive bookings across major cities like LA, London, Mexico City, and Paris. Launched in 2005, Eater embodies the concept of "You are able to find the best dining options" with an aim to cater to food enthusiasts. Stay connected and indulge in remarkable dining experiences with Eater, available for all your reservation needs in various global destinations.

news.headline: Biotalys closes private placement without specifying total voting rights or shares issued.
news.summary: Data on the overall voting rights and shares issued by a company have been disclosed. As per the report, the total number of voting rights stands at X, while the total number of shares available is Y. This information is crucial for investors and stakeholders to have a comprehensive understanding of the company's ownership structure and voting dynamics. The transparency provided by these figures is vital for ensuring accountability and facilitating informed decision-making within the organization.

news.headline: Trump's musical town hall viewed as 'weird' and 'surreal' by media outlets after he DJed at a campaign event, covering the event extensively.
news.summary: At a recent campaign event, former President Donald J. Trump took on the role of a DJ, and this move garnered widespread attention from both liberal and conservative media sources, who collectively labeled the occurrence as "surreal."

news.headline: Kintara Therapeutics undergoes 1-for-35 reverse stock split in preparation for merger with TuHURA Biosciences.
news.summary: San Diego-based Kintara Therapeutics, Inc. disclosed on October 16, 2024, that their Board of Directors has given the green light for a reverse stock split. Kintara, trading on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol KTRA, is dedicated to creating innovative treatments for solid tumor cancers. This move by the Board aims to consolidate the company's stock, a strategy frequently employed to boost shareholder value by reducing the number of outstanding shares.

news.headline: Cruise Planners introduces industry-first tech tools at CP World Convention in Coral Springs, offering game-changing updates.
news.summary: In Coral Springs, Florida on October 16, 2024, Cruise Planners, the largest home-based travel agency franchise network in the United States, shared groundbreaking news at their annual CP World Convention. The event unveiled a pioneering set of innovations, marking a significant milestone for the company. The updates revealed during the convention have the potential to revolutionize the travel industry.

news.headline: NH corrections workers choose Teamsters Local 633 after failed raid attempt. 235 officials retain union representation.
news.summary: In Manchester, New Hampshire on October 16, 2024, 235 public safety officials have decided to keep their representation through the Teamsters. The decision comes after a thwarted raid effort by a different union. Corrections officers and corporals working at the New Hampshire Department of Corrections facilities in Berlin and Concord participated in the vote to maintain their membership with the Teamsters.

news.headline: Illumination PR partners Robyn Bordes & Deven Turner, boosting entertainment PR, based in NY. (Character count: 93)

This partnership comes after nine years...

news.headline: Houston's Oaks Fine Cleaners is 1 of 5 finalists in Global Professional Textile Care Best Practices Awards.
news.summary: A Houston-based company, Oaks Fine Cleaners, has been recognized as one of the top five textile merchants in the country. They have been selected as a finalist for the prestigious Global Professional Textile Care Best Practices Awards.

news.headline: ICD, American Honda, and KLA discuss AI for portfolio analytics in corporate treasury. AI integration to address challenges.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in New York City, the company ICD, specializing in institutional investment technology, will collaborate with corporate treasury leaders from American Honda Motor Company and KLA Corporation. They will convene to explore the applications of artificial intelligence (AI) in alleviating various obstacles in their operations. This unprecedented discussion will involve insightful exchanges on leveraging AI to streamline processes and enhance efficiency within the corporate treasury sector.

news.headline: Record decline in bond allocations fueled by increased investor optimism: survey finds.
CareNu's subsidiary SECUR has launched a Medicare Advantage Health Plan for patients with advanced chronic illness.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on October 16, 2024, a new Institutional Special Needs Plan has been introduced by CareNu, a healthcare organization focused on using predictive analytics to improve care for those with advanced chronic illnesses. This plan is designed to provide tailored care specifically for patients with complex medical needs. CareNu aims to offer personalized and comprehensive support to individuals with chronic conditions, such as heart disease, diabetes, or respiratory issues. This initiative comes as an effort to address the growing number of patients requiring specialized care, with an estimated focus on serving X number of individuals in the coming year. By leveraging data-driven approaches, the organization intends to optimize the treatment and outcomes for this vulnerable patient population.

news.headline: Heimar hf. completes share buyback program announced on September 16, 2024. Program now closed.
news.summary: The buyback initiative, revealed on September 16, 2024, has successfully concluded.

news.headline: Global Diabetic Food Market to reach US$ 23.33 Billion by 2032 with a 6.01% CAGR from 2024. Rising diabetes rates driving growth in convenient, ready-to-eat options.
news.summary: In Dublin, the Global Diabetic Food Market is on the rise as per the "Diabetic Food Market Report, Forecast by Products, Distribution Channel, Countries and Company Analysis, 2024-2032". Currently valued at US$ 13.80 Billion in 2023, it is projected to reach US$ 23.33 Billion by 2032, exhibiting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.01% from 2024 to 2032. This growth is attributed to factors such as the increasing prevalence of diabetes, a growing consumer awareness regarding nutrition and health, advancements in food technologies, and government initiatives.

news.headline: EY survey shows 74% of tech industry leaders believe US election will impact sector's global competitiveness.
news.summary: A recent study by Ernst & Young LLP found that 74% of technology industry business leaders believe the results of the upcoming US election will significantly affect the US tech sector's competitiveness against global rivals. The survey, conducted in New York on October 16, 2024, suggests that a vast majority of professionals in the tech industry are closely watching the election's potential impact.

news.headline: Brad Griffith appointed as new CEO of Freight Farms, Inc. Former CCO of Compass Minerals, with 23 years experience. Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: Freight Farms' Board of Directors has named Brad Griffith, a seasoned Agri-Food professional with 23 years of experience and former CCO of Compass Minerals, as the new Chief Executive Officer. The appointment was made unanimously, signaling trust and confidence in Griffith's leadership. The company, headquartered in Boston, made the announcement on October 16, 2024, via a press release on PRNewswire. Freight Farms, a prominent provider in its industry, looks forward to Griffith's expertise and vision to drive growth and success in the future.

news.headline: EVESANA, global commercial services provider in life sciences, named Great Place to Work for 6th year, certified in 9 countries.
news.summary: In Chicago on October 16, 2024, EVERSANA, a top provider of worldwide commercial services for the life sciences sector, was recognized as a Great Place to Work for the sixth year running by a prominent workplace culture authority. The company achieved this honor with a remarkable increase in the number of employees, demonstrating its commitment to fostering a positive and engaging work environment.

news.headline: S&P Global: Emerging markets will shape the economic landscape.
Intero Real Estate names 112 agents/teams in 2024 RealTrends Verified City Rankings, incl. 85 agents, 20 small teams, 4 medium teams, 2 large teams, and 1 mega team.
news.summary: In Cupertino, California, Intero, a Berkshire Hathaway affiliate and wholly owned subsidiary of HomeServices of America, Inc., has highlighted the achievement of 112 individual agents and teams in the 2024 RealTrends Verified City Rankings. This includes recognition for 85 individual agents, 20 small teams, 4 medium teams (The Nicoli Group, The Eddie Oberoi Team, GAEA Team, Troyer Group), 2 large teams (The Keith Walker Team, Tse Group), and 1 mega team (Vong Group).

news.headline: North Korean-linked developers were involved in creating Cosmos staking module, per co-founder. Gross negligence blamed on validator hosting firm and its leader.
news.summary: The co-founder of Cosmos has blamed the validator hosting firm Iqlusion and its leader, Zaki Manian, for a significant oversight, which he described as "gross negligence."

news.headline: Builders in Atlanta earns Great Place To Work Certification for two years straight, with 96% employee satisfaction.
news.summary: In Atlanta on October 16, 2024, it was announced that Builders has received Great Place To Work® Certification™ for the second year in a row. This prestigious award is determined by feedback from current employees, with a remarkable 96% of employees affirming that Builders is a great place to work.

news.headline: FDA awards Fast Track designation to Valneva and LimmaTech's tetravalent Shigella vaccine candidate S4V on October 16, 2024.
news.summary: Valneva SE and LimmaTech Biologics AG, based in Saint Herblain, France, and Schlieren, Zurich, respectively, revealed that the FDA has awarded Fast Track designation to Shigella4V (S4V), the leading tetravalent bioconjugate shigellosis vaccine candidate. This cutting-edge vaccine is the most clinically advanced in the world and has been licensed globally by Valneva from LimmaTech. Valneva, a specialist vaccine company listed on Nasdaq as VALN and Euronext Paris as VLA, expressed excitement about this development.

news.headline: ARGAN and CARREFOUR transformed France's largest brownfield into an AutoNom facility. #industrialRevitalization
New book by Sparks Financial Group reveals a mathematical formula for reliable retirement income.
news.summary: A financial expert from Sparks Financial Group discusses the effectiveness of a basic mathematical formula in establishing a dependable retirement income plan. The author, based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, shared this insight on Oct. 16, 2024. By utilizing this formula, individuals can enhance the sustainability of their retirement savings. This information aims to assist diligent Americans who believe they have secured their financial future.
